title: Coin Selection
description: Coin selection is the process a wallet uses to choose which UTXOs fund a payment. It balances fee cost, change creation, and privacy tradeoffs before signing or broadcasting a transaction.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Coin Selection
resources.notes: Concise overview of why wallets choose different UTXO sets and how fee and privacy pressures shape the algorithms.

resources.title: Bitcoin Design Guide: Coin Selection
resources.notes: Clear product and UX framing for the tradeoffs wallets expose or hide from users.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core RPC: fundrawtransaction
resources.notes: Concrete implementation surface where automatic funding and selection behavior becomes visible.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for UTXOs, change outputs, and wallet transaction construction.
